title: What I learned building my first iOS app from scratch
summary: Lessons from going from zero to a published SwiftUI app — what the docs don't tell you about MVVM, Xcode quirks, and the surprisingly hard parts of building for mobile.

title: Understanding transformer architectures without a PhD
summary: A product leader's working understanding of how large language models actually work — attention mechanisms, training pipelines, and what RAG means in practice vs. on a whiteboard.

title: The Intelligent Investor, read in 2025
summary: Benjamin Graham's framework still holds up. Notes on value investing principles, margin of safety, and what the Magnificent 7 would look like through Graham's eyes.

title: A product person's guide to neural network architectures
summary: Comparing Transformers, CNNs, RNNs, Diffusion models, and DLRMs — what each is actually good for, and how to think about them when evaluating AI products.

title: Example Hidden Post
summary: This post only appears after clicking 'View more' — demonstrating the expand behavior. Delete this entry or replace it with one of your real posts.
